steps.title: Substitute the shifted input
steps.content:
Since $g(x)=f(x+3)$, replace the input of $f$ with $x+3$.
$$g(x)=7(4)^{x+3}$$

steps.title: Separate the exponent
steps.content:
Use exponent rules to rewrite the expression.
$$7(4)^{x+3}=7(4)^x(4)^3=7(64)(4)^x=448(4)^x$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Graphing the original function and the shifted function gives the same simplified rule:
$$g(x)=448(4)^x$$
The answer is B.
